title: Cracker's Wither Storm - Music
description: A client-side addon for Cracker's Wither Storm, allowing you to set custom music using a URL for the Wither Storm's events and phases.
body:
# About this mod
This mod is designed as an add-on to [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod), and partially inspired by the [V-Sides Soundtrack mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod-v-sides-soundtrack). This mod allows you to define custom music to play during certain events of the Wither Storm using a Youtube URL. The mod is also **fully client-side**, meaning you can use the mod without it being installed on the server (also means no lag)!

**You may use this mod in your modpack.**

Below is an example of the Now Playing overlay, which will display the song title and progress, with support for scrolling text to view the full title.

![Now Playing Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da4fe7e2692e9a384154a61a7d3ba691c0875f5_0.webp)

This mod is in early development, expect many changes.
**FFMPEG IS REQUIRED AND NOT BUNDLED WITH THE MOD - Place the contents of an FFmpeg build's /bin folder into the .minecraft/witherstormmusic/bin folder.**

# Main Features
- Robust audio conversion & playback - preserves audio quality
- Music will slowly fade when you leave the Wither Storm's range (configurable)
- When leaving the range of the Wither Storm, the timestamp of the song's playback is saved, and resumes seamlessly when entering the range of the Wither Storm again
- Distance-based music triggers for realistic ambiance
- Highly configurable - Overlay, toasts, individual track volume, manual file checking etc. can be toggled and changed
- Configuration powered by Cloth Config
- Built-in setup wizard assists with configuration

**List of currently configurable events**
- Phase 1-3
- Phase 4-5
- Formidibomb (inventory, placed, and ignited)
- Withered Symbiont
- Phase 6-7
- Bowels ambient theme
- Command block fight
(Revival and fake death are planned.)
  
**All of the above have configurable volume and distance for each event.** 

## Specific information
The mod is pre-bundled with YT-DLP, hence 50MB+ filesize. YT-DLP is necessary for music to be downloaded via the URL, aswell as metadata retrieval.

For now, only Youtube URLs are supported. To define a URL for the mod to use, go to the config and navigate to the desired event which is under a category (see gallery). The mod also contains a setup wizard (which can be accessed through a popup shown when running the mod for the first time), explaining the mod's function, FFmpeg's installation process (if missing) and setting up URLs for each phase.

**URL changes may require a full restart of Minecraft, however they typically queue for download when in proximity to the Wither Storm**.

### Known issues:
- *Some* songs on Youtube may fail to provide metadata or lack the required metadata, and this causes the Now Playing Overlay to fail to display. 
- Most PCs experience ~5 second lag spikes when audio playback begins - **be careful when initiating the command block fight or you may not be able to prevent yourself from falling out of the bowels.**

**If you encounter any other issues, reach out to me on Discord - @mythologic_al**
